success.description: Your prayers to Verena reveal an insight into the item's past. The GM reveals a piece of information such as who owned the item most recently, where it was made, or what it was used for

As above, but the information is of superior quality or quantity, sufficient to grant to future Education, Folklore, Intuition, or Observation checks where the object's past is relevant (at GM discretion)

delay.description: This information is confusing and vague. It will take you quite some time to interpret it (hours, or as long as it takes you to reach a library), and you gain no benefit until then

success.description: Your prayers to Verena reveal an insight into the item's past. The GM reveals a piece of information such as who owned the item most recently, where it was made, or what it was used for

As above, but the information is of superior quality or quantity, sufficient to grant to future Education, Folklore, Intuition, or Observation checks where the object's past is relevant (at GM discretion)

exertion.description: The information comes in the form of a rush of images, exhausting to behold. You suffer sufficient stress and fatigue to distress your Willpower and fatigue your Toughness
